creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 162433
deadbeef gui option fix

Apparently, the actual problem is that the parent option in OPTIONS_RADIO (GUI in our case) lives its own life, specifically, it's not always get set when any of child options is enabled or unset when all child options are disabled.

Attached a fix. It works for me with the default configuration (-> GTK2) and works fine when choosing GTK3.
